description: Light, floral themes rule this Femme fragrance for women from hugo boss. boss Femme has a first impression of a subtle bouquet of tangerine, black currant and freesia, and a sensitive heart of Madagascar jasmine, oriental lily and rose.Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
